caribbean.headline: Caribbean Storm Hits Barbados
caribbean.paragraph: Barbados is experiencing 16 kt winds and 5.2 ft wave heights with a 100% rain probability, while St. Lucia is seeing winds of 12 kt. I expect these conditions to impact ports in the Lesser Antilles, particularly Barbados, with significant rainfall and moderate winds persisting throughout the day.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Rise
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing 21 kt winds with 5.3 ft wave heights and less than 10% rain probability, while Lisbon has relatively calm conditions with 10 kt winds. I expect the strong winds in Mykonos to dominate the weather story in the Mediterranean today, with the Eastern Mediterranean bearing the brunt of the increased wind speeds and wave heights.
